seo.title: Brunch in Carlsbad Village | PRK 101
seo.description: BBQ brunch on the rooftop at Park 101 in Carlsbad Village. Smoked tri-tip chilaquiles, breakfast burritos, Rodeo Tower mimosas. Served daily, 11 AM to 2 PM.

hero.heading: Brunch on the Rooftop
hero.body: Open-air rooftop. Smoked brisket chilaquiles. Breakfast burritos loaded with tri-tip. Rodeo Tower mimosas. The best way to spend a Saturday morning in Carlsbad Village.

intro.heading:
Not Just Brunch.
A Whole Morning.
intro.body: Park 101's brunch isn't eggs and toast — it's the smokehouse meeting the morning. Chilaquiles built on smoked tri-tip, burritos loaded with brisket, and a rooftop that catches the California sun from the first plate to the last mimosa.

privateEvents.heading: Private Brunch Events
privateEvents.body: Birthday brunches, baby showers, and weekend group gatherings — reserve the rooftop or a section of the venue for your crew.

final.heading: Brunch at Park 101
final.body: Every day from 11 AM to 2 PM. Reserve your table before the rooftop fills up.
